name: Digi Power X Inc.
summary: PART I . As used in this Annual Report, the terms we, us, our, the Corporation, Digi Power X Inc. and Digi Power mean Digi Power X Inc. and its consolidated subsidiaries, unless otherwise indicated. Overview The Corporation is an innovative energy infrastructure company that develops cutting-edge data centers to drive the expansion of sustainable energy assets.
